75444.subject: Onchain Assets Weekly: SECZ Special Edition
75444.body:
Onchain Assets Weekly

Автор: Securitize


Автор: Securitize

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-secz-special-edition-securitize-ay30c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BlFMr9QzOQ5%2BiNXdn%2Br0hEQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=13GRDjKyRetYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr58bfoz~p3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr58bfoz-p3
  
In a special edition of Onchain Assets Weekly: Securitize goes public. Now trading on the New York Stock Exchange under SECZ, this milestone marks a new chapter for Securitize — and an important moment for the future of tokenized securities. As the first newly public company to tokenize its own stock from day one, Securitize is bringing its mission to the public markets. Here’s what leading outlets are saying. Under the Radar: Securitize Stock Jumps in NYSE Debut | The Wall Street Journal The WSJ shares that Securitize shares traded as much as 16% higher in the tokenization firm’s NYSE debut. With Carlos adding, “I think this is a good signal that crypto is growing up and it's just moving from more speculative assets into real‑world assets.” READ MORE Securitize Tokenizes $295 Million of its Own Stock on Solana and Avalanche Amid NYSE Debut | CoinDesk The newly-public company's shares are the largest issuer-sponsored tokenized stock at launch, aiming to make a point against rival third-party stock token issuers. READ MORE BlackRock Partner Securitize Rides Wall Street Tokenization Wave | Bloomberg Bloomberg profiles Securitize's NYSE debut as a milestone for both the company and the broader tokenization market, validating the company’s strategy as tokenized real-world assets move further into the financial mainstream. READ MORE “This Will Put the Word Tokenization and What it Means for Capital Markets Out There” | CNBC’s Fortt Knox Carlos talks to CNBC’s Jon Fortt about being the first pure-play tokenization firm to list on a major U.S. exchange, what this means for tokenization on the whole, and what the future holds. WATCH NOW “Tokenization Is the Most-Discussed Topic in the Industry” | Schwab Network Carlos shares “why now” when it comes to Securitize going public and how, when it comes to tokenization, we are at the end of the beginning. “There’s a lot of growth ahead of us.” WATCH NOW Direct Ownership, From Day One | Taking Stock Deputy COO Suzy Singh talks to Taking Stock’s J.D. Durkin about how Securitize’s common stock is already issued onchain and gives retail investors the ability to hold it directly in their own wallets. “We’re tokenizing the world.” WATCH NOW
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-secz-special-edition-securitize-ay30c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_seri

75441.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Bitcoin ETFs end $2.7 billion outflow streak
75441.body:
Spotify asks Kalshi, Polymarket to remove branding after manipulated streams used to settle music bets | Samsung, Dunamu say they were listed as OUSD stablecoin consortium members without official consultation | Bank of Russia governor says 'everything is ready' for widespread use of digital ruble ahead of September rollout | IMF says policy choices will determine whether tokenization strengthens or fragments the financial system |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Naga Avan-Nomayo

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday 🎉 *Bitcoin* held above $61,000 ahead of the U.S. *Independence Day* holiday as softer-than-expected jobs data revived risk appetite, though analysts caution ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407131/markets-find-their-footing-bitcoin-holds-61000-rebound-ahead-of-us-independence-day-as-soft-jobs-data-eases-rate-fears?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) the *Fed* outlook remains far from settled.

In today's newsletter, *Bitcoin ETFs* break a 10-day outflow streak, *Spotify* asks *Kalshi* and *Polymarket* to strip its logo from their platforms, *South Korean* firms say they were listed as members of the *OUSD* consortium without consultation, and more.

Meanwhile, *Irish authorities* recover ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407062/irish-authorities-recover-another-500-bitcoins-lost-clifton-collins-drug-stash?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) another 500 BTC from the lost *Clifton Collins* -linked drug stash.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*💸 US bitcoin ETFs break 10-day negative streak with $222 million worth of inflows*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407110/us-bitcoin-etfs-222-million-inflows?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

U.S. spot *bitcoin* ETFs logged $221.7 million in net inflows on July 2, breaking a 10-day outflow streak, according to SoSoValue data.

* *Fidelity's FBTC* led with $166 million in inflows, followed by *Ark Invest and 21Shares' ARKB* with $91.8 million and *VanEck's HODL* with $4.4 million.
* The inflows mark the first positive day since June 16, after a losing streak that totaled more than $2.7 billion.
* *BlackRock's IBIT* was the only fund to see net outflows on Thursday, shedding $40.4 million in its 11th

75440.subject: Happy birthday America, the ally Europe admires—uneasily
75440.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sJmNvrifr3nCgfbbaJ-Emclh_a6sUlVdh4S-5v26ffheyBRPyUZfSd88Tx0zrO8KW_Sy8XrYeOyvXA3af5dNlQdSb9CtT8mswwgCjDqg 

July 3rd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sKwMCYU-3A1lOA5Y_5fQ-u3HMeNyvNd2ND7gM1Uv_S9gr9874BEC4SfIQPffIaY3T-otIa6XAPMAaOK37vuQJFT86tTpKw4EIUJGWhvg 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sLIFERoHg1Vrm57W8GC-iTuioW7Xil7f1w5JhtzUyfSvuMOL9dCnVPOekJl42FVKkdr5I1IzxKUACaBPefqW3sXzIr7dltJXJklN-UXQ 


 


 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



America is undeniably richer and more powerful than Europe. Some Europeans sneer that comes with costs (in quality of life, inequality or environmental damage) which they simply wouldn’t put up with. Maybe. But as the new kid turns 250, the two sides can learn from each other without having to 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sM5kSGJZAudysJiwMBnSfYn1Yd1x910Pg-lgKeJ6GUtzs5U630W8h7i1eR501aUylTL-UJTrvfD5nnHBvyX4p0Q_xeiq8u4r5b 
import each other’s flaws .


We said oil prices were in “la-la land” and had to go much higher as a result of the Iran war. 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjZ9AAcAAAAAA4bir4sNSmc69kHIS1kT16B0zeQnnmF_a4M08JAw-h2lEaltMkx7rL77pR

🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Beyond Bitcoin's rebound, the day's real signal is structural: institutions and regulators are rewiring crypto's plumbing — tokenized equities, real-world assets and fresh rulebooks — while enforcement actions and DeFi expansion push the sector steadily forward. 🏦 Robinhood CEO Bets Crypto's Future Is Real-World Assets, Not Memecoins Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev argued that the merging of traditional finance and crypto — not memecoins — defines the sector's future, pushing back on the idea that digital assets have entered an enduring downturn. The comments land as Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet and the brokerage leans harder into tokenized stocks and on-chain lending. Read full story 🇪🇺 Europe Opens 'MiCA 2.0' Review of Its Crypto Rulebook Three years after MiCA became law, the EU has opened a formal review — informally called "MiCA 2.0" — through a consultation set to close around September. The rethink could reshape how exchanges, stablecoin issuers and custodians operate across the bloc as regulators weigh what the landmark framework got right and where it fell short. More details 🇮🇳 Maharashtra Brings Crypto Under Depositor Protection Law India's Maharashtra state moved to place cryptocurrencies and virtual digital assets under its depositor protection law, and will set up district-level financial monitoring units to flag fraudulent investment schemes. The amendment marks a tightening of state-level oversight of crypto fraud in one of India's largest economies. The case highlights the deepening cross-border cooperation aimed at dismantling cybercrime networks that rely on crypto for extortion. See details 🧱 Securitize Launches Tokenized SECZ Stock on Avalanche and Solana Securitize debuted tokenized shares of its own SECZ stock on Avalanche and Solana, timed to its common stock's debut on the New York Stock Exchange.
